question: Refinance loan for better rate
answer:
User asked: "Can I refinance my loan to get a better rate?"

What chatbot answered: Perfect answer — yes, negotiable for larger loans, tiers listed, custom pricing for $5M+, connect to lending desk.

Why good: Clear, complete, transparent, with follow-up.

Fix: No changes needed. This is perfect.

Advice: This is the gold standard for refinancing questions.

question: Deposit confirmation
answer:
User asked: "How do I get a confirmation that my deposit was received?"

What chatbot answered: Gave deposit instructions. Did NOT say how to get confirmation.

Why missing: User asked specifically about confirmation. Chatbot answered about how to deposit.

Fix: Add email confirmation and dashboard status.

Correct answer:

"You will receive an email confirmation once your deposit is credited after 3 network confirmations. You can also see the deposit status in your dashboard under Wallets → Transaction History. Would you like me to help you track your deposit?"

Advice: For "how to get confirmation" questions, always mention email + dashboard.

question: Staking rewards compounding frequency
answer:
User asked: "How often are staking rewards compounded? Daily?"

What chatbot answered: "Rewards credit daily at 00:00 UTC" — clear and correct.

Why good: Direct answer, specific time, accurate.

Fix: No changes needed. This is good.

Advice: This is the gold standard for frequency questions.

question: Larger trade size better price
answer:
User asked: "Does a larger trade size give me a better price?"

What chatbot answered: "Tighter the bigger you trade" — yes, clear.

Why good: Direct answer, transparent about spreads.

Fix: No changes needed. This is good.

Advice: This is the gold standard for pricing questions.

question: Delete account and all data permanently
answer:
User asked: "Can I delete my account and all my data permanently?"

What chatbot answered: Perfect answer — yes, conditions, cannot reopen, data retention 5-7 years.

Why good: Honest, complete, compliant, with follow-up.

Fix: No changes needed. This is perfect.

Advice: This is the gold standard for account deletion questions.

question: Interest taken from wallet or collateral
answer:
User asked: "Where is the interest taken from? My wallet or my collateral?"

What chatbot answered: Talked about Wallets page. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about interest payment source. Chatbot answered about Wallets page.

Fix: Add new intent for INTEREST_SOURCE.

Correct answer:

"Interest is automatically deducted from your available balance in your custody wallet. If your wallet balance is insufficient, interest may be added to your loan principal. It is never taken from your collateral. Would you like me to explain how to ensure you have sufficient balance for interest payments?"

Advice: For "where is interest taken from" questions, clarify: from wallet balance, never from collateral.

question: Staking rewards expiration
answer:
User asked: "Do staking rewards expire if I don't claim them?"

What chatbot answered: Explained how staking works. Did NOT answer expiration question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about expiration. Chatbot answered about staking process.

Fix: Add new intent for REWARDS_EXPIRATION.

Correct answer:

"No, staking rewards do not expire. They accumulate in your account until you claim them. There is no time limit. You can claim them at any time, even years later. Would you like me to help you check your accumulated rewards?"

Advice: For "do rewards expire" questions, answer "No" first, then explain they accumulate indefinitely.

question: Transfer time to external wallet
answer:
User asked: "How long does it take to move assets between custody and external wallet?"

What chatbot answered: Talked about internal transfers between own wallets. Did NOT answer external withdrawal time.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about withdrawal to external wallet. Chatbot answered about internal transfers.

Fix: Add new intent for WITHDRAWAL_TIME.

Correct answer:

"To withdraw assets from custody to an external wallet, go to Wallets → Withdraw. Enter the external address and amount, confirm with 2FA. Withdrawals typically take 1 to 4 hours to complete. Would you like me to guide you through the withdrawal process?"

Advice: For "transfer to external wallet" questions, give the withdrawal time (1-4 hours) and steps.

question: Price for $10M Bitcoin trade right now
answer:
User asked: "Can you give me a price for a $10M Bitcoin trade right now?"

What chatbot answered: "$10M qualifies for Institutional tier with custom terms. Shall I set up a bespoke proposal?"

Why good: Correct, professional, offers action.

Minor fix: Add an indicative range.

Correct answer:

*"For a $10M Bitcoin trade, you qualify for our Institutional tier with bespoke OTC spreads (typically 0.05-0.10%). Our desk can provide a firm quote within minutes. Shall I connect you with our OTC desk for a firm quote?"*

Advice: For "price right now" questions, give an indicative range and then offer a firm quote.

question: See all devices logged into my account
answer:
User asked: "Can I see all devices logged into my account?"

What chatbot answered: Talked about portfolio dashboard. Did NOT answer the question.

Why wrong: Wrong intent. User asked about active sessions/devices. Chatbot answered about portfolio.

Fix: Add new intent for ACTIVE_SESSIONS.

Correct answer:

"Yes, you can see all devices logged into your account. Go to Settings → Security → Active Sessions. You will see a list of devices with login time, IP address, and location. You can also remotely log out any device from this list. Would you like me to help you review your active sessions?"

Advice: For "see all devices" questions, give the exact location (Settings → Security → Active Sessions) and mention remote logout.

5	Delete account and all data	✅ 10/10	Perfect — no changes

7	Staking rewards expiration	❌ 2/10	Add REWARDS_EXPIRATION intent (No)
8	Transfer time to external wallet	❌ 2/10	Add WITHDRAWAL_TIME intent (1-4 hours)
9	Price for $10M Bitcoin trade	✅ 9/10	Add indicative range (optional)

Intent	Variants
INTEREST_SOURCE	"where is interest taken from", "interest deducted from wallet or collateral", "interest payment source"
REWARDS_EXPIRATION	"do staking rewards expire", "rewards expiration", "unclaimed rewards expire"
WITHDRAWAL_TIME	"how long to withdraw to external wallet", "transfer to external wallet time", "withdrawal duration"

📝 GOLDEN RULES FOR ABDUL (Based on Set 13)
Rule	Example
For "how to get confirmation" questions	Mention email confirmation + dashboard status

For "do rewards expire" questions	Answer "No" first, explain they accumulate indefinitely
For "transfer to external wallet" questions	Give withdrawal time (1-4 hours) and steps
For "price right now" questions	Give indicative range, then offer firm quote
